June 2026 · Publication

A preprint of our paper on groundwater effects on landscape response to tectonics is available. Read it here.

May 2026 · Conference

David presented groundwater and tectonic geomorphology work at the GSA Penrose conference on high mountain hydrogeology in Nepal
